---
title: Text Extraction from Handwritten Student Health and Nutrition Records
subtitle: Use case study to demonstrate the use of large language models (LLMs) for text extraction from handwritten records
author:
  - name: Sylvie Pool
    email: sylvie.pool@ndm.ox.ac.uk
    affiliation:
      - name: University of Oxford
        department: Nuffield Department of Medicine
        group: Centre for Tropical Medicine and Global Health
        address: Peter Medawar Building for Pathogen Research, South Parks Road
        city: Oxford 
        country: United Kingdom
        postal-code: OX1 3SY
        url: https://www.tropicalmedicine.ox.ac.uk/study-with-us/msc-ihtm
  - name: Ernest Guevarra
    orcid: 0000-0002-4887-4415
    email: ernest.guevarra@ndm.ox.ac.uk
    affiliation: 
      - name: University of Oxford
        department: Nuffield Department of Medicine
        group: Centre for Tropical Medicine and Global Health
        address: Peter Medawar Building for Pathogen Research, South Parks Road
        city: Oxford
        country: United Kingdom
        postal-code: OX1 3SY
        url: https://www.tropicalmedicine.ox.ac.uk/study-with-us/msc-ihtm
date: last-modified

bibliography:
  - references.bib
  - packages.bib
csl: nature.csl

lightbox: auto

format: 
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-location: left
    embed-resources: true
    mermaid-format: png
    grid:
      body-width: 900px
      margin-width: 300px
    code-tools:
      source: https://github.com/OxfordIHTM/computer-vision-demo/blob/main/reports/text-extraction-handwriting.qmd
---

```{r setup}
#| echo: false

suppressPackageStartupMessages(source(here::here("packages.R")))
for (f in list.files(here::here("R"), full.names = TRUE)) source (f)

targets::tar_load(
  c(
    dplyr::ends_with("extraction_results"), 
    dplyr::ends_with("extraction_results_*")
  )
)
```
